debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
classical
  have h₁ : IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓'
      (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) (by simp)
  have h₂ : IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
      (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.fun_right ?_
    intro i
    simpa using
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ))
        (by
          have : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
          simpa using this))
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a)

    simpa using
      (Bandit.indepFun_eval_succ_Iic (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓'] using h_indep_stream.prod_fst
  exact (h₁.indepFun_left h₂).1 h_indep_prod

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) (by simp)
  have h_vec_id :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine identDistrib_pi.2 ?_
    intro i
    simpa using
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ))
          (by exact Nat.succ_ne_zero _)).trans (IdentDistrib.refl (μ := 𝔓') (ν := 𝔓') _)
  refine (h_id.indepFun_iff.2 ?_).trans ?_
  · simpa using
      (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  · exact h_vec_id.indepFun_iff.1 (IndepFun.refl _)

-- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` depends only on the first time the pull count reaches `n+1`,
  -- hence on rewards strictly after all times witnessing the first `n` pulls.
  -- Use the i.i.d. stream and the adaptedness of the algorithm to obtain independence.
  classical
  simpa [IndepFun] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (A := A) (R := R) (P := P) h a n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` is a function of `stepsUntil ... (n+1)` and the reward stream at that time.
  -- The family `fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount ... i` is measurable w.r.t. the past up to `stepsUntil ... n`,
  -- hence independent from the next reward in the environment stream.
  -- This follows from the i.i.d. structure of the reward stream measure.
  refine (indepFun_of_indepFun_comp_right ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  -- reduce to independence of two disjoint coordinate families of the reward stream under `streamMeasure`
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω.1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (stepsUntil A a (↑i + 1) ω.1) a) 𝔓' := by
    -- use independence between the `Ω` part and the reward stream, and independence inside the stream
    simpa [𝔓'] using
      (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ stepsUntil A a (n + 1) ω)
        (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (stepsUntil A a (↑i + 1) (Classical.choice inst✝¹)) a)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  simpa [rewardByCount] using h_indep_stream
simpa using (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa using (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  have h₁ : IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) (by simp)
  have h₂ :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.piCongrRight ?_
    intro i
    simpa using
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ) + 1) (m := (i : ℕ))
        (by simp)).trans ?_
    simpa using (identDistrib_eval_eval_id_streamMeasure ν ((i : ℕ) + 1) a).symm
  refine (h₁.indepFun_iff.2 ?_).mono_ac ?_
  · -- independence in the stream measure: coordinate (n+1) is independent of coordinates ≤ n
    have h_ind :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
          (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic_infinitePi (ν := fun _ : ℕ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) (n := n) (a := a))
    simpa [𝔓'] using h_ind.prod_fst
  · intro ω
    exact ω

classical
  have h_ident := identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1)
    (by exact Nat.succ_ne_zero n)
  have h_ident' :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω ↦ rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) ω)
        (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    h_ident
  have h_identF :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ ω.2 i a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.pi fun i => ?_
    simpa using
      identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ))
        (by
          cases i with
          | mk i hi =>
            simpa using Nat.succ_ne_zero i)
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    have h_indep_eval :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω (n + 1)) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i)
          (Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) := by
      simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_eval_infinitePi_of_not_mem (μ := fun _ : ℕ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν)
          (s := (n + 1)) (t := (Set.Iic n)) (by
            intro hs
            exact Nat.not_succ_le_self n (by simpa [Set.mem_Iic] using hs)))
    have h_indep_eval' :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω (n + 1))
          (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using h_indep_eval
    exact h_indep_eval'.comp (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 i a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓'] using
      (indepFun_fst_snd.comp measurable_fst (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
        (by
          simpa [𝔓'] using h_indep_stream))
  exact (h_ident.indepFun_iff.mp h_indep_prod).mono
    (by intro ω; rfl) (by intro ω; rfl)

classical
  simpa [indepFun_iff_condIndepFun] using
    (IsAlgEnvSeq.indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa [rewardByCount, stepsUntil] using
    (indepFun_eval_eval_of_disjoint (μ := 𝔓') (m := n + 1) (s := (fun i : Iic n => (i : ℕ))))

classical
  refine (indepFun_iff_indepFun_finset.2 ?_)
  intro s
  classical
  have hs : (∀ i : ℕ, i ∈ (s.image (fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ))) → i ≤ n) := by
    intro i hi
    rcases Finset.mem_image.1 hi with ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩
    exact (j.2)
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω i : (s.image (fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ))) ↦ ω i a)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    have hdisj :
        Disjoint ({n + 1} : Set ℕ)
          (s.image (fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ)) : Set ℕ) := by
      refine Set.disjoint_left.2 ?_
      intro i hi hn1
      have : i ≤ n := hs i hi
      have : i ≠ n + 1 := by
        exact ne_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt this (Nat.lt_succ_self n))
      exact this hn1
    simpa [indepFun_iff_indepSets_preimage, hdisj] using
      (indepFun_eval_infinitePi (ν := ν) (a := a) (hdisj := hdisj))
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω i : (s.image (fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ))) ↦ ω.2 i a)
        𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.snd, Measure.map_map] using
      indepFun_snd_prod.2 h_indep_stream
  have h_ident :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1))
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) 𝔓' 𝔓' :=
    (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).trans
      (identDistrib_rfl)
  have h_ident' :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (i : ℕ) ω)
        (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
    refine IdentDistrib.funext ?_
    intro i
    exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (i : ℕ) (i : ℕ) (Nat.pos_of_mem_Iic i).ne').trans
      (identDistrib_rfl)
  exact (h_ident.indepFun_iff h_ident').2 <|
    (h_indep_prod.comp measurable_fst (by fun_prop))

have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) id 𝔓' (ν a) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)
  have h_vec :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    classical
    refine IdentDistrib.funext ?_
    intro i
    simpa using identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (i : ℕ) i a (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  refine (h_id.indepFun_iff.mp ?_).trans ?_
  · exact (indepFun_id_left.mp (by
      simpa using (indepFun_prod (X := fun _ : Ω ↦ (1 : Unit)) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))))
  · exact (h_vec.indepFun_iff.mp (by
      classical
      simpa using (indepFun_pi (μ := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (X := fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (Y := fun ω i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
        (by
          intro i
          exact indepFun_eval_eval_of_ne (μ := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (by
            exact ne_of_gt (Nat.lt_succ_of_le i.2)))))).symm

simpa using
    (IsAlgEnvSeq.indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  -- Both sides are functions of the environment reward stream only.
  refine (indepFun_fst_prod_of_indepFun_snd ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).symm
  -- The reward stream is an independent product measure; evaluations at different coordinates are independent.
  -- `rewardByCount` at pull `k` is distributed as the evaluation at coordinate `k` for action `a`.
  have h₁ : IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓'
      (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  have h₂ :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.funext (fun i ↦ ?_)
    simpa using
      identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (i : ℕ) (i : ℕ)
        (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
          have : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
            intro hi
            have : (0 : ℕ) ≤ i := by exact Nat.zero_le _
            have : (i : ℕ) = 0 := hi
            cases i using Subtype.casesOn with
            | _ i hi_le =>
              simpa at this
          exact this))
  refine (IndepFun.identDistrib h₁ h₂).2 ?_
  -- Now use independence of different coordinates of the reward stream.
  simpa using
    (Bandit.indepFun_eval_succ_Iic_streamMeasure (ν := ν) (a := a) n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` is (a.s.) evaluation of the stream at index `n` for action `a`,
  -- while the RHS depends only on evaluations at indices `≤ n-1`; these are independent in
  -- the i.i.d. stream measure and also independent of `P` in the product measure.
  have h1 :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω n a) 𝔓'
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n) (by simp)
  have h2 :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 (i.1 - 1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine
      (IdentDistrib.fun_comp (μ := 𝔓') (ν := 𝔓') (f := Prod.snd) (g := Prod.snd)
            (IdentDistrib.rfl) ?_).trans ?_
    · -- placeholder; we will replace by a direct `IdentDistrib` via pointwise a.e. equality
      -- on the event `stepsUntil ... = (i-1)`; easier: use `IdentDistrib` through `HasLaw`.
      -- Instead, use `IdentDistrib` from the fact that the whole `Ω` component is irrelevant
      -- for the stream evaluations used in `rewardByCount` (a.s. on `𝔓'`).
      -- We do this by `IdentDistrib` to `id` and then to the required map.
      exact by
        -- fall back to `IdentDistrib` with identical functions
        simpa using (IdentDistrib.rfl : IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))
          (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) 𝔓' 𝔓')
    · -- same as above; keep as reflexive
      exact by
        simpa using (IdentDistrib.rfl : IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω))
          (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ (fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)) 𝔓' 𝔓')
  -- use independence in the stream measure between coordinate `n` and the sigma-algebra generated
  -- by coordinates `< n`; then lift to the product and transfer along `IdentDistrib`.
  have hind_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω n a)
        (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 (i.1 - 1) a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    -- independence of disjoint coordinate sets in the product measure
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic_sub_one (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
  have hind_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 n a)
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.2.1 (i.1 - 1) a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.prod] using indepFun_snd_of_indepFun (μ := P) hind_stream
  -- transfer via `IdentDistrib`/a.e. congruence
  refine hind_prod.congr ?_ ?_
  · -- left: `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` equals evaluation at `n` a.s.
    refine (h1.ae_eq ?_).symm
    exact (by fun_prop)
  · -- right: just keep as same (we used a simplified representation already)
    refine ae_of_all _ (fun ω ↦ rfl)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` is distributed as the `(n+1)`-st stream reward `ω.2 (n+1) a`,
  -- while the vector of previous `rewardByCount`'s is measurable w.r.t. the first `n` stream
  -- coordinates; independence follows from independence of coordinates in `streamMeasure`.
  refine (indepFun_congr ?_ ?_).1 ?_
  · refine (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) ?_).indepFun_left
    exact Nat.succ_ne_zero n
  · refine ?_
    -- identify the finite vector with a measurable function of the stream; then use independence
    -- of coordinate `n+1` from the first `n` coordinates.
    refine (IdentDistrib.indepFun_right ?_).2 ?_
    · -- `fun ω i => rewardByCount ... i ω` has same law as `fun ω i => ω.2 i a`
      -- by applying `identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval` pointwise and using `IdentDistrib.pi_map`.
      have h_id :
          IdentDistrib
            (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a (i : ℕ) ω)
            (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' 𝔓' := by
        refine IdentDistrib.pi_map (μ := 𝔓') (ν := 𝔓') (ι := Iic n) ?_ ?_
        · intro i
          exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ))
            (by
              have : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
                -- `i ≤ n` so `i=0` is allowed; handle separately
                intro hi
                cases i with
                | mk k hk =>
                  cases k with
                  | zero =>
                    exact this.elim (by simp at hi)
                  | succ k =>
                    simp at hi
              exact this)).trans (IdentDistrib.refl (by fun_prop))
      exact h_id
    · -- independence of stream coordinate `n+1` and first `n` coordinates
      simpa [𝔓', Measure.prod_assoc, Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ (1 : ℝ)) (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a)
          (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop))
  · -- congruences
    · intro ω; rfl
    · intro ω; ext i; rfl

classical
  simpa [IndepFun] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h_inter) (a := a) (n := n))
simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic h a n

simpa using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  -- both sides are measurable functions of the reward stream only; use independence in the stream measure
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α → ℝ) => ω (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) => ω (i.1) a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using
      (indepFun_eval_Iic_infinitePi (ν := fun _ : ℕ => Measure.infinitePi ν) (n := n) (a := a))
  -- lift independence to the product measure and transfer laws via `identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval`
  refine (h_indep_stream.comp_identDistrib ?_ ?_).mono_ac ?_ ?_
  · exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1)
        (hn := Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).symm
  · have h_id : IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) (i : Iic n) => rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) (i : Iic n) => ω.2 (i.1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      refine IdentDistrib.pi ?_
      intro i
      simpa using
        (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i.1)) (m := (i.1))
          (hn := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
            intro hi
            have : (i : ℕ) = 0 := by simpa using hi
            exact i.2 (by simpa [this])))).symm
    exact h_id
  · intro ω
    rfl
  · intro ω
    funext i
    rfl

simpa using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) (by simp)
  have h_id' :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.funext (fun i ↦ ?_)
    simpa using
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ))
        (by exact Nat.succ_ne_zero _)).symm
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using
      (Bandit.indepFun_eval_succ_Iic (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
  have h_indep' :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 i a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.prod, Measure.snd, Measure.fst] using
      (indepFun_snd_comp (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) h_indep_stream)
  exact (h_id.indepFun_iff.2 <|
    (h_id'.indepFun_iff.2 h_indep')).1

classical
  simpa using (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

simpa using
    (IsAlgEnvSeq.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  -- both sides are functions of the environment stream only; use independence in the product measure
  have h_left :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) 𝔓'
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1) (by simp)
  have h_right :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine (IdentDistrib.funext ?_).symm
    intro i
    simpa using
      identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := (i : ℕ)) (m := (i : ℕ)) (by
        have : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
          cases i with
          | mk i hi =>
            intro h0
            simpa [h0] using hi
        exact this)
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    simpa using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic_streamMeasure (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.snd_prod] using
      (indepFun_snd_of_indepFun_snd (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) h_indep_stream)
  exact (h_left.indepFun_iff.2 h_indep_prod).trans (h_right.indepFun_iff.1)

simpa [indepFun_iff] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa [IndepFun] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (h := h) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  have hn1 : n + 1 ≠ 0 := Nat.succ_ne_zero n
  have hid : IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) id 𝔓' (ν a) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (n + 1) hn1
  refine (hid.indepFun_left ?_).1
  refine indepFun_id ?_
  intro i
  have hi0 : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
    exact Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp (Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ_iff.mp (show 0 + 1 ≤ (i : ℕ) + 1 from Nat.succ_le_succ i.2)))
  exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_id h a (i : ℕ) hi0).comp _ (by fun_prop)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount (n+1)` has the law of the `(n+1)`-th coordinate of the i.i.d. stream,
  -- while the family indexed by `Iic n` depends only on the first `n` coordinates.
  refine (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (h := h) (a := a) (n := n + 1) (m := n + 1)
      (by exact Nat.succ_ne_zero n)).indepFun_iff.2 ?_
  simpa using
    (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic (ν := ν) (n := n) (a := a) (m := n + 1))

simpa [IndepFun] using
    (h.indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (P := 𝔓') a n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` is a function of the `n+1`-th reward of action `a`,
  -- while the family indexed by `Iic n` depends only on the first `n` rewards of action `a`.
  -- Under `𝔓' = P × streamMeasure ν`, the reward stream is i.i.d. and independent of `P`.
  -- Hence the corresponding coordinates are independent.
  simpa [rewardByCount, stepsUntil] using
    (indepFun_prod (X := fun ω : Ω ↦ ω)
      (Y := fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ (ω (n + 1) a, fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i a))
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).snd.comp
